3175320.name: University Tycoon - The College Management Simulator Demo
3175320.description:
Build and manage your own University campus!

Create a realistic curriculum by scheduling your own courses and sections.

Construct multiple buildings, including dorms, to expand your college.

Hire a range of different professors.

Improve your University's reputation to attract more renown professors and better students as you attempt to build a world famous college.

The demo has all of the features of the main game, but with a 15 time limit and no ability to save.
